title: Crispy Italian Vine Leaf Wraps
description: Tangy and crisp, these vine leaf wraps showcase layered Italian flavors without eggs.
instructions: Rinse the vine leaves under cold water, pat dry and set aside.
Heat olive oil in a non-stick skillet over medium heat; sauté onion, garlic, carrot, celery, and bell pepper until softened, about 4 minutes.
Add diced tomatoes and cook for another 2 minutes.
Fold in spinach and cook until wilted, about 1 minute.
Season the mixture with oregano, basil, salt, pepper, and lemon juice; stir well and remove from heat.
Lay a vine leaf flat on a clean surface, spoon 2 tablespoons of the filling onto the center, fold the sides over the filling, and roll tightly. Repeat with remaining leaves and filling.
Place the wraps seam side down in a steamer basket or on a towel-stitched bowl; steam for 6-8 minutes until the leaves become crisp and the filling is heated through.
Slice each wrap into bite-size pieces.
Serve warm, garnished with chopped parsley and toasted pine nuts, and a wedge of lemon if desired.
